metadata.name: Handle an Overage, Shortage, and Damage (OS&D) Report

description: A driver at a delivery location reports a discrepancy between the bill of lading and what is being unloaded (e.g., one pallet is over).

nodes.task_description: The driver calls to report an overage of one pallet at the delivery.

expected_outcome.value: The dispatcher is aware of the discrepancy.

nodes.task_description: The dispatcher creates an OS&D report in the system, detailing the issue.

expected_outcome.value: A formal record of the discrepancy is created.

nodes.task_description: The dispatcher instructs the driver to have the receiver sign for what they received and to note the overage on the POD.

expected_outcome.value: The driver gets the proper documentation.

nodes.task_description: The OS&D team investigates the source of the extra pallet and arranges for its return or proper disposition.

expected_outcome.value: The discrepancy is investigated and resolved.
